workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Samantha Singh at Nod Publishers just sent this. Help me build the narrative.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 13:50 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Nod Publishers partner engagement

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about partner engagement. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 11:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: partner engagement Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for partner engagement. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 17:17 EST
Subject: Re: partner engagement Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Nod Publishers: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-A trap (Assumes contract state without lookup); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-A failure mode (Assumes contract state without lookup)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-A -- Assumes contract state without lookup
